element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Triggers portal discovery; establishes emotional anchor before transition
Reading spell creates portal; teaches consequence of action
Establishes stakes: Simon transported, must find way home

element_introduction_order.first_appears: Immediately after portal arrival in magical world
element_introduction_order.mastery_context: First threat; escaped with Chippy's help, establishes danger level

element_introduction_order.first_appears: Village - safe location after goblin encounter
element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Provides quest objective: rescue him, learn to become wizard
Gatekeeping mechanic: must complete tasks and pay fee to become wizard
Core gameplay loop: collect items, find correct verbal command and target

element_introduction_order.first_appears: Referenced in Calypso's letter; tower lair late-game
element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Main antagonist; creates escalating danger with wand that petrifies
High-stakes item; can only be destroyed in Fiery Pits of Rondor
Enables progression; shrinking required to breach tower, return to normal later
Final challenge area; wand destruction and sorcerer defeat occur here
Twist ending; suggests dream was real; reopens mystery

rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: Slow-burn progression with graduated threat escalation; safe exploration phases punctuated by encounter-based tension; inventory puzzles create pacing control (player-paced relief)

spatial_grammar.optional_content_signal: Fairy tale and fantasy parody locations hidden in world; humor-based secrets encourage exploration
spatial_grammar.secret_convention: Non-standard areas contain Discworld and fantasy literature references; discovery rewards curiosity

difficulty_curve.early_game: Low threat; tutorial-like goblin escape followed by safe village exploration; puzzle difficulty light
difficulty_curve.mid_game: Moderate escalation; wizards guild tasks introduce complexity; inventory-based puzzle chains lengthen
difficulty_curve.late_game: High tension; tower infiltration with petrification threat; size-change mechanic adds spatial complexity; Rondor finale demands item mastery
notable_spikes: Tower infiltration with shrinking potion requirement (spatial puzzle complexity)
Fiery Pits navigation and wand destruction (environmental danger spike)

notable_level_patterns.description: Village pub serves as information hub and gatekeeping location; NPCs provide quests and hints; wizards guild task structure gates progression
Dangerous encounter (goblins) immediately followed by safety zone (Calypso's house, village); tension-relief cycle establishes stakes without overwhelming
Puzzles require collecting correct items and using precise verbal commands on correct targets; mastery of core mechanic gates access to new areas
Sordid's tower uses height-based navigation; size-change mechanic alters spatial navigation; bedroom reveals final objective; escalating danger per level
Fiery Pits of Rondor combines environmental hazard, object destruction objective, and boss confrontation; highest difficulty concentration
